text:

Committed, thank you! 

Ruslan, I also added you to the FreeBSD contributors page, and your 
name should show up in the next day or so.   look forward to seeing 
more PRs from you! 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributors/contrib-additional.html 

Best regards, 
Greg
